title: Bosch 1x EXPERT HEX-9 MultiConstruction Drill Bit (for Concrete, Soft tiles, Ø 5,00 mm, Professional Accessory Impact Drill/Driver, Rotary Drill/Drivers)
features: Up to 5x more precise than a Bosch CYL-3 Drill Bit
Accurate drilling is easier with Bosch Centering Geometry
Hex shank for a strong connection and maximum torque transmission in three-jaw chucks and ¼" internal hex tool holders
Ideal for drilling holes into multiple materials; can be used in impact mode on concrete and stone, and on rotary setting for brick, soft ceramic tile, sheet metal, wood and plastic
Scope of delivery: Bosch EXPERT HEX-9 Multi Construction Drill Bit, 5x90x150
description: Up to 5x more precise than a Bosch CYL-3 drill - modern construction sites require working with many different materials and you never know what to drill next. Finding the right drill can be difficult and time-consuming - unless you have the Expert Multi Construction drill. This extremely versatile drill allows precise drilling into hard materials such as granite without slipping. This is made possible by its sharp point and advanced geometric design. It has been manufactured using our fine grinding manufacturing process from optimised carbide and is therefore equally suitable for concrete, brick, soft ceramics, wood and metal. Regardless of the material, it always does professional work. The Bosch Expert HEX-9 Multi Construction drill is a must-have in any toolbox: you can do every job precisely and waste no time searching for the right drill. Hex shank for a strong connection and maximum torque transfer in triple jaw chucks and 1/4" hex socket tool holders
